meaning: n.[动]阿帕卢萨马(产于美国西部,臀及腰部有斑纹)
examples: Question 4 : In which country did Appaloosa, Palomino, and Pinto horses originate and gain popularity?
She remembered being a little girl, riding a pony beside her grandfather, who sat on his tall Appaloosa.
Appaloosa horses wear fly masks in a horse van, following their competing in the 2010 World Championship Appaloosa Youth Show in Jackson, Mississippi.

The founder and head of Appaloosa Management guided his flagship hedge fund to net returns of nearly 30%.
